prompt: It's your first day at Hero Academy, and your class is suddenly put through a surprise training simulation. A villain hologram appears and challenges you to a duel! What do you do?

options.text: Charge in and attack head-on.
Analyze the villain's weaknesses before making a move.
Work together with your classmates to come up with a strategy.
Try to talk your way out of the fight.

prompt: During combat training, your teammate is struggling against a powerful opponent. The instructor watches closely to see what you'll do. How do you respond?

options.text: Jump in and help your teammate immediately.
Give them advice from the sidelines but let them fight their own battle.
Distract the opponent so your teammate can get the upper hand.
Trust that they’ll figure it out and focus on your own training.

prompt: Your class is patrolling through town, when you notice an old woman calling her cat down from a tree. It's stuck! What do you do?

options.text: Leave the cat alone, it probably knows how to get down.
Get to the top of the tree somehow and carry the cat down.
Uproot the tree and shake the cat off into the owner's arms.
Call the fire department, they can handle it.

prompt: Your class is sent on a night patrol exercise when you hear an alarm go off at a nearby bank. A group of masked criminals is trying to break into the vault. What’s your plan?

options.text: Confront them directly and fight.
Sneak around and gather intel before acting.
Alert your instructor and wait for backup.
Use your powers to set a trap for the criminals.

prompt: Emergency in town! All heros needed for a giant slime monster attacking the city. How will you respond?

options.text: Assess your classmates strengths and make a detailed plan of action.
Just wing it. Everyone knows what they're doing.
Stay home! We are only in training and could get in the way.
Show up to the scene, but wait for instructions from the professionals.
